SELECT toUInt128OrNull(value) FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%';
SELECT toUInt128OrNull(CAST(value AS String)) FROM test_table;
SELECT value, toUInt128OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE converted_value IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toUInt128OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table GROUP BY converted_value HAVING converted_value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT id, toUInt128OrNull(value) FROM test_table_2 WHERE id = 3;
SELECT t1.value, t2.value AS other_value, toUInt128OrNull(t1.value) AS converted_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table_2 t2 ON t1.value = t2.value WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(toUInt128OrNull(value)) FROM test_table_2 GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(toUInt128OrNull(value)) > 0;
